lessons.title: What is a Flood?
body: A flood is an overflow of water that submerges land that is usually dry.
Rule of thumb: *Turn Around, Don’t Drown*—15 cm of water can move a small car.

lessons.title: Alerts & Go-Bags
body: Enable government alerts on your phone and radio.
Go-bag essentials: water purification tablets, torch, radio, meds, copies of IDs.

lessons.title: Evacuation Basics
body: Move to higher ground immediately when water rises.
Switch off electricity if safe. Never wade through moving water.
Follow official routes—do not take shortcuts through flooded roads.
